sections.title: Talking to Abigale or Hewey again

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: Please, you need to make sure they don't get away with this! You can use the boat over there to get to the island we escaped from.

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: Help! Help!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What has happened here?

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: We were invited to a house party on an island not far from here... Something felt wrong about the whole thing but we went anyway...

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: The house seemed pretty creepy, but everything was going fine, we were all having a good time...

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: ...and that's when we got attacked...

lines.speaker: Hewey
lines.text: I... I tried to save her...

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: Hewey bought me enough time to find an old boat. I went back to get him but it was too late. I'm scared that he won't make it.

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: You have to do something... they can't get away with this!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you want me to do?

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: That psycho is still out there, you have to bring them to justice.

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: The boat we escaped on is just over there, you can use it to get to the island.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not getting involved in this!

sections.title: Trying to use the rowboat before starting the quest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I should probably talk to whoever left this boat here before rowing off in it...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll have to find the key...

lines.speaker: Sid
lines.text: Woo, party on bro!

lines.speaker: Sid
lines.text: Woah, that wind totally just felt like someone breathing on my neck!

lines.speaker: Sid
lines.text: Whoah, not cool bro...

lines.speaker: Sid
lines.text: ...urgh...

lines.speaker: Sid
lines.text: ...I'm feeling woozy...

lines.speaker: Sid
lines.text: ...gargh...

lines.speaker: Sid
lines.text: ...I see the light...

lines.speaker: Sid
lines.text: ...urrggghhh...

lines.speaker: Sid
lines.text: ...it's not my time...glurgh

lines.speaker: Sid
lines.text: ...gargle...urgh...

lines.speaker: Sid
lines.text: ...glargh...help...me...

lines.speaker: Sid
lines.text: ...urgh...hergle...

lines.speaker: Sid
lines.text: ...flergh.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Gosh, that was horrible and so drawn out!

lines.speaker: Sid
lines.text: ...urgh...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh wow, he's still going...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think he is actually dead this time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you? Why are you doing this!?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Gah! I've got to find a way into that house and stop this maniac!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wonder what it was that I saw fall into that barrel?

sections.title: Search the barrel without emptying it

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The barrel is full of rainwater, I can't see what's in there.

lines.speaker: Tayten
lines.text: Gurgle...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nooooo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's this? A note? I guess I should read it.

sections.title: Taking the knife from the table
Using the wrong key on a coloured handle door
Taking a tinderbox from the shelves
Attempting to light the fuse while the candles are unlit

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The fuse is too damp to light...

sections.title: Attempting to light the fuse once the candles are lit

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The fuse is lit, I should get out of here before it blows!

sections.title: Attempting to light the fuse after it has been lit

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The fuse is already lit! I need to get out of here before it blows!

lines.speaker: Lacey
lines.text: Please, stop this, just let me go!

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: We're going to play a game. Do you like to play games?

lines.speaker: Lacey
lines.text: No...yes....whatever you say, just don't hurt me!

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: Whether you get hurt or not is entirely up to you. Your fate is in your own hands.

lines.speaker: Lacey
lines.text: What!? What do you mean!?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Leave her alone you monster!

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: Ah, [player name], how kind of you to join us. Now if you say another word, I will end her right now!

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: Sorry, where were we? Ah yes, of course! The game!

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: Do you like quests, Lacey?

lines.speaker: Lacey
lines.text: Ummm, sure, I like quests.

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: Do you like scary quests?

lines.speaker: Lacey
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: What's your favourite scary quest?

lines.speaker: Lacey
lines.text: I don't know.

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: You have to have a favourite.

lines.speaker: Lacey
lines.text: Umm.....the one with that vampyre in it who lives in a big house.

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: Good, good. And now for that game I spoke about.

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: I am going to ask you one question. Get it wrong and you die, but get it right and you live.

lines.speaker: Lacey
lines.text: Oh Guthix please no, please don't, I don't want to die!

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: Then think hard about your answer. You like vampyres so this should be easy for you. The question is this...

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: Who is the Vampyre that resides in South Misthalin?

lines.speaker: Lacey
lines.text: Urm...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Count Draynor!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Count Check!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lord Drakan!

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: This game didn't involve you [player name]! Now her death is on you! Her blood is on your hands you fool!

lines.speaker: Lacey
lines.text: Gargle...urgh...

lines.speaker: Lacey
lines.text: Oh yes, yes, I know it! Count Draynor!

lines.speaker: Lacey
lines.text: Ha, in your face you masked freak!

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: Oh Lacey, Lacey, Lacey. I did tell you to think hard about your answer.

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: Count Draynor is in fact a vampyre, and he does reside in his manor in Misthalin.

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: But that manor is in WEST Misthalin! I was talking about Count Check! Thanks for playing!

lines.speaker: Lacey
lines.text: No, no you tricked me! This isn't fair, ask me another...

lines.speaker: Lacey
lines.text: Gargle...urgh...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That monster! I have to stop them! Let's see what that new note says.

sections.title: Observing tree after Lacey is killed
Searching the piano after unlocking it

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There is no time to be playing around!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think that's right... Perhaps the clue the killer left behind could help?

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: Why am I the one who is always left clearing up after everyone?

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: Hello? Anyone there?

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: Hello? Lacey? Sid?

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: Hmm, well I guess I should go check it out. No point staying in this nice, locked room when I could go outside into the creepy darkness.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Seriously!?

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: Oh, and I don't think there is any need to take this big, shiny weapon with me in order to defend myself. Nothing bad ever happens when people go check out noises in the dark outside of houses!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You have got to be kidding...

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: Ok, well, here I go!

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: Hello, anyone out here?

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: See, I knew nothing would happen! Must have just been a squirrel or something running about.

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: Oh well, back to the dishes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Phew, that was lucky!

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: No...why...me...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That psycho! He was just toying with her!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Another note. This guy really likes playing games, but this is going to be a game he won't win!

sections.title: Using a knife on the fireplace

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think that's the right order.. Perhaps the clue the killer left behind could help?

sections.title: Searching the fireplace after solving the riddle

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Show yourself you coward!

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: So we meet at last. I have to say, I'm impressed you worked out my riddles.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well maybe you aren't as smart as you think you are.

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: Oh really? All the dead bodies suggest otherwise. And what did you do to stop them?

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: NOTHING!

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: People think you are some big hero but you're not. All you adventurers are the same. Nothing but opportunists!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you going on about?

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: Well, I did have this big speech planned out but quite frankly I don't think you are worth the effort it would take to deliver it.

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: So, this is the end of the line for you. It is time for the final act. The showdown. The finale. Let's see if you are up to the challenge!

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: *ouch*

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: Ouch!

sections.title: Taking the killer's knife with a full inventory

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: Urgh...I think I may have underestimated you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You've lost at your own game. And now it is time to see who you really are under that mask!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No! You!? But why!? Why on earth would you kill all your friends!? Why beg me to come here to help them!?

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: You just don't get it do you?

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: So big headed. So used to it all being about you. About you saving the day.

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: Well I'm sick of it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: Adventurers! You're all the same. Everything always has to be about you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't understand?

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: Of course you wouldn't! Because you can't see past yourself!

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: Believe it or not... I used to be like you.

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: I'd hear about some damsel in distress and go to help. To have my moment. For me to be the hero, just for once.

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: But YOU! You and every other darned adventurer! Every time I get there to help, it's too late. Crisis solved. Disaster averted. Reward claimed. Every time you and those other adventurers steal my moment!

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: But not this time!

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: This time, it is all about me! I'm the star of the show! ME ME ME ME ME!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well not any longer. The show is over, and there will be no curtain call.

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: Oh, but there is always a curtain call.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What!? How!? There was another killer!?

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: Of course. Every good show needs a good supporting actor. Now, take off your mask darling. Take a bow. You have earned it.

lines.speaker: Killer
lines.text: Of course, my love.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You!? But how!? You were almost dead when I saw you! I saw your wounds!

lines.speaker: Hewey
lines.text: No, what you watched was what we wanted you to watch. A masterful performance if I do say myself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But what is in this for you?

lines.speaker: Hewey
lines.text: Everyone loves the limelight, and who better to share it with than my beloved Abigale.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But your friends?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They didn't deserve to die!

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: Perhaps not, but neither did I deserve to be cast back into the shadows when I deserve the spotlight!

lines.speaker: Hewey
lines.text: Yes, while we deserve the spotlight.

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: And now I have my starring role!

lines.speaker: Hewey
lines.text: OUR starring role.

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: Gielinor will forever remember this night and what I have done here.

lines.speaker: Hewey
lines.text: No, what WE have done!

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: Quiet Hewey! This is my moment!

lines.speaker: Hewey
lines.text: No, this is supposed to be our moment! It isn't just all about you either! We were in this together!

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: Stop ruining this Hewey! I have worked so hard for this and I'm not going to let you take it away from me!

lines.speaker: Hewey
lines.text: Well I'm not going to be pushed aside either, we were both in this as equals!

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: We were never equals! How could you possibly compare to me!?

lines.speaker: Hewey
lines.text: You egotistical, selfish...

lines.speaker: Hewey
lines.text: No...my love...

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: No....no...what have I done!?

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: It wasn't supposed to be like this...but you just couldn't let me have my moment. WHY HEWEY WHY!? I loved you...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This could be my chance to take advantage of the situation...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think he's in a very talkative mood.

sections.title: Attempt to fight Abigale without wielding a weapon

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not going at her empty-handed!

sections.title: Attempt to fight Abigale while wielding other weapons

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It would be wiser to use the killer's knife rather than my own weapon...

sections.title: Fight Abigale while wielding the killer's knife

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well thank Saradomin that's over! I should get out of here.

sections.title: Attempt to talk to Abigale after stabbing her

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think she wants to talk to me right now.

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: You'll never escape me!

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: You dare try and ruin my moment!

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: Hewey is dead because of you!

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: Now it is time for you to join him!

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: You're not killing anyone else!

lines.speaker: Abigale
lines.text: No....this can't be it....

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, that was close!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mandy, how are you alive!? I watched you get stabbed through the heart!

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: I did get stabbed, but I was born with a rare condition called Dextrocardia.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Dextrowhat?

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: Dextrocardia. It means that my heart is on the right side of my chest, not the left like most people.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So when the killer thought they stabbed you in the heart, they actually missed?

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: Well, missed the heart yes.

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: I did still get stabbed though, and am actually feeling pretty woozy...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, yes, right! You should go sort yourself out!

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: I will wait outside the house after seeing to this stab wound. You should come talk to me there.

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: Thanks again for your help, [player name]. Stay safe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You too, Mandy.

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: Oh hi, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Mandy. How are you feeling now?

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: Much better thanks, and lucky to be alive, thanks to you in no small part.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well we saved the day as a team, so thank you too.

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: I found some stuff in the wardrobe when I was seeing to my wound. You need [3 more spaces/2 more spaces/another space] in your inventory to take it all.

lines.speaker: Mandy
lines.text: Here, I found these in the wardrobe when I was seeing to my wound. I don't want them so please, take them...
